title: GreenPan Glass Lid with Stainless Steel Handle, 26cm
features: GreenPan is the pioneer of healthy ceramic non-stick: safe cookware that doesn't contain any toxic chemicals or persistent pollutants and is easy to use
Universally fits any round fry pan or saucepan with matching circumference, GreenPan and GreenLife cookware is recommended.
Tempered glass which is oven-safe up to 390 degrees F
Please note: this item is a lid only, GreenPan cookware sold separately.
description: From the manufacturer GreenPan Accessories Efficient meal prep Tempered Glass Lids Choose a fitting glass lid for your pan to observe your dish while it's cooking. This makes cooking faster and more efficient. Available to fit any pan The right size The glass lids are available in different sizes so you can find the right one for your existing pans. Convenient cooking Easy clean-up With their metal handle, the glass lids are oven safe up to 200°C and dishwasher safe. Flexible and safe Pan Protectors Protect your pots and pans from scratches when stacking and storing your cookware. The flexible design fits regardless of the size of the pan. Conveniently safe Pan Protector Sets Simply add a felt protective sheet between the pans to ensure no scratches on the coating of the pan. The sheets are machine washable as well. HEALTHY COOKING STARTS WITH GREENPAN

specifications_table.Warranty description: ‎Lifetime warranty from date of purchase against defects in material and workmanship.
